title: AX Designer — Conversational AI
description: Meridian Systems builds enterprise AI assistants for customer support teams. Our agents handle complex support requests by pulling data from multiple systems, reasoning through solutions, and delivering natural-language responses. We're hiring an AX Designer to own the experience layer for these agents.
responsibilities: Design the conversational experience for our enterprise AI assistant — including tone, pacing, escalation patterns, and error recovery
Define agent behavior guidelines: when the agent should ask clarifying questions, when to deliver partial results, and when to escalate
Create prompt templates and output quality rubrics for our agent team
Conduct conversation audits — analyzing agent-user interactions to identify patterns, failures, and opportunities
Collaborate with product and engineering to ship agent experience improvements on a weekly cadence
Mentor junior designers on AX design principles and AI product thinking
requirements: 3+ years of UX or interaction design experience, with hands-on work on AI or conversational products
Deep understanding of conversation design principles — turn-taking, error recovery, tone management, and escalation
Experience designing for AI uncertainty — users need to know when the agent is confident vs. guessing
Proficiency with Figma, prototyping, and research tools
Ability to write clear, structured prompt instructions and evaluation criteria
Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment where agent behavior is iterated weekly
niceToHave: Published conversation design patterns or frameworks
Experience with enterprise B2B SaaS products
Understanding of NLU/LLM capabilities and limitations
Background in customer support or experience design
